title: Repurposed Structures - Oh The Biomes You'll Go Compat
description: Add BYG's forager houses to RS Villages
body:
## This datapack is not needed for Biomes We've Gone because as of 1.20.1+, that mod has compat with Repurposed Structures out of the box!

Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Oh The Biomes You'll Go! You will find the forager houses with their workstations in all RS's Villages. Enjoy mushroom hunting in more biomes now!

- Oh The Biomes You'll Go mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tqtqwUe3/images/9d08ad9324111736c2cbfd9b4c2f4331dc9109d7.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tqtqwUe3/images/9d08ad9324111736c2cbfd9b4c2f4331dc9109d7.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
